V balení najdete celkem 12 elektrod o velikosti 5 × 5 cm. However, this Compass assistant will help you with parking problems. It has 4 sensors and an audible signal of the distance from the obstacle . The sensor works on the principle of ultrasonic waves, which are transmitted by sensors in the rear bumper. The sensors are active as soon as reverse gear is engaged.
